args: $adb='C:\Users\Emjay\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; & $adb connect 192.168.50.170:5555; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $pid = (& $adb -s 192.168.50.170:5555 shell 'pidof com.iptvapp').Trim(); if ($pid) { & $adb -s 192.168.50.170:5555 forward tcp:5005 jdwp:$pid; Write-Host "Forwarded JDWP pid $pid to localhost:5005" } else { Write-Error 'App not running on Shield — start it first' }

$adb='C:\Users\Emjay\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $pid = (& $adb -s 192.168.50.89:44201 shell 'pidof com.iptvapp').Trim(); if ($pid) { & $adb -s 192.168.50.89:44201 forward tcp:5006 jdwp:$pid; Write-Host "Forwarded JDWP pid $pid to localhost:5006" } else { Write-Error 'App not running on Pixel — start it first' }

$adb='C:\Users\Emjay\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; & $adb connect 192.168.50.170:5555; & $adb -s 192.168.50.170:5555 install -r app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk; & $adb -s 192.168.50.170:5555 shell 'am start -n com.iptvapp/.ui.home.HomeActivity'; Start-Sleep 3; $pid = (& $adb -s 192.168.50.170:5555 shell 'pidof com.iptvapp').Trim(); if ($pid) { & $adb -s 192.168.50.170:5555 forward tcp:5005 jdwp:$pid; Write-Host "Ready — attached to pid $pid on localhost:5005" } else { Write-Error 'App failed to start' }

$adb='C:\Users\Emjay\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; & $adb connect 192.168.50.89:44201; & $adb -s 192.168.50.89:44201 install -r app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk; & $adb -s 192.168.50.89:44201 shell 'am start -n com.iptvapp/.ui.home.HomeActivity'; Start-Sleep 3; $pid = (& $adb -s 192.168.50.89:44201 shell 'pidof com.iptvapp').Trim(); if ($pid) { & $adb -s 192.168.50.89:44201 forward tcp:5006 jdwp:$pid; Write-Host "Ready — attached to pid $pid on localhost:5006" } else { Write-Error 'App failed to start' }
